full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Confirming the JSON structure matches what Part A used.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: my part b disclosure files need to follow part a format but add task_tag, code_used_verbatim, and student_modification. can you confirm what the structure should look like
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: N/A — format check. I filled all 10 files myself.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed the keys: student_metadata, llm_tools_used, full_llm_interaction_log, top_5_prompts, student declaration. Also pointed out student_modification should still be present even when code_used_verbatim is false.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Compared against my Part A file llm_usage_partA.json.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: for top 5 prompts if i only had 3 interactions for a task do i need to pad it with 5 or just include the 3
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Said if fewer than 5 interactions, include all of them. The instructions also say 'if fewer than five interactions were logged for a task, include all of them'.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Another small check on cross-file referencing.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: can the top_5_prompts in llm_task_1_1.json reference an interaction from llm_task_2_2.json if that interaction was also relevant?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Said no — top_5_prompts must come from interactions in the same file. Cross-file references violate the per-task disclosure intent.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Manually checked all files to make sure interaction IDs in top_5_prompts only reference within the same file.

top_5_prompts.prompt: my part b disclosure files need task_tag, code_used_verbatim, and student_modification on top of part a format, can you confirm the structure
top_5_prompts.why_important: Getting format wrong means losing 1.5 marks per file across 10 files = 15 marks. This was worth double-checking.

top_5_prompts.prompt: can top_5_prompts in one file reference an interaction from a different file?
top_5_prompts.why_important: Needed to know this before finalising all 10 files to avoid having to redo them.

top_5_prompts.prompt: if i only had 3 interactions for a task do i need to pad to 5 prompts or just use the 3?
top_5_prompts.why_important: Quick practical question that confirmed I don't need to invent extra interactions.

student declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for the indicated task.
